title: lindsaea merrillii subsp. yaeyamensis
intro: Lindsaea merrillii subsp. yaeyamensis is a rare, endemic subspecies of the Lindsaea merrillii species, belonging to the family Lindsaeaceae, and is a type of fern. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lindsaea merrillii subsp. yaeyamensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
